info.title: Weatherbit API
info.description: Weather API providing current weather observations, forecasts, historical weather data, severe weather alerts, air quality data, and geolocation services from over 120,000 weather stations worldwide.

tags.name: Air Quality
tags.description: Current and forecast air quality data

get.description: Get current weather observations from the nearest station. Returns temperature, feels-like, humidity, dew point, wind, pressure, cloud cover, visibility, precipitation, UV index, air quality, and solar irradiance data.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include additional data: minutely, alerts, or lightning

200.description: Successful response with current weather data

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Get daily weather forecast for up to 16 days. Returns temperature, precipitation probability, wind, cloud cover, humidity, pressure, dew point, visibility, UV index, ozone, and lunar/solar data.

200.description: Successful response with daily forecast data

get.description: Get hourly weather forecast for up to 240 hours (10 days).

200.description: Successful response with hourly forecast data
Successful response with minutely precipitation forecast

get.description: Get daily historical weather data. Over 25 weather fields returned including min/max temperature, precipitation, snowfall, and snow depth.

200.description: Successful response with daily historical data

get.description: Get hourly historical weather data with over 20 weather fields.

200.description: Successful response with hourly historical data

get.description: Get active severe weather alerts for US, Canada, EU, and Israel.
Get current air quality data including PM2.5, PM10, CO, SO2, NO2, O3, and AQI scores. Also includes pollen and mold levels.

200.description: Successful response with air quality data
Successful response with air quality forecast

get.description: Get 30-year climate normals (1991-2020) at 9km spatial resolution.
Get latitude/longitude from an IP address.
Monitor your API subscription usage and quota.

severity.description: Alert severity: Advisory, Watch, or Warning
